name: Chicken 'n' Vegetable Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium Red or Green Pepper, thinly sliced
1 envelope EnV Golden Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into thin strips.
2. Thinly slice the carrot and red or green pepper.
3. Prepare the stir fry by heating oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the sliced carrots, bell peppers, and broccoli to the pan; sauté until just tender.
5. Stir in the snow peas and cook for 1-2 minutes more.
6. Mix the onion soup mix with the ground ginger in a small bowl.
7. Pour the mixture into the pan and stir well.
8. Add the soy sauce, vinegar, and cooked rice to the pan; toss everything together until evenly coated.
9. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until heated through.
10. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
